name: Endpoint
description: An E911 endpoint representing an end user

endpointId.description: The unique identifier for the endpoint

alternateEndUserId.description: The Alternate End User ID (AEUI) that identifies the end user

callerName.description: The name of the end user for PSAP display

locationId.description: The ID of the validated location associated with this endpoint

telephoneNumber.description: The phone number associated with this endpoint

activated.description: Whether the endpoint is currently active
